title: Create : Renewable Emerald
description: A create mod add-on that adds renewable emerald
body:
Create Mod add-on for renewable emerald.

Added Items:
- Quartz Dust
- Emerald Dust
- Emerald Shard

Added Recipes:
- Crushing Quartz for Quartz Dust
- Mixing Quartz Dust and Lime Dye for Emerald Dust
- Bulk Blasting Emerald Dust for Emerald Shard
- Compacting Emerald Shard for Emerald
